prestazioni: Engine: RB20DET swap (2.0L inline-6, iron block, aluminum head, 245hp stock) with forged internals (JE 87mm forged pistons, Eagle H-beam rods, ACL race bearings) and Tomei 264° camshafts for high-RPM powerband retention. Turbocharger: Garrett GT2860RS-5 (ball-bearing, 0.82 A/R turbine housing) with custom 3-inch stainless downpipe and GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller targeting 1.5 bar (21.7 psi) peak boost.

Fuel System: Walbro 450LPH in-tank fuel pump, Nismo 550cc/min injectors (Z31-specific), Sard 1,000cc top-feed fuel rail, and AEM 320LX standalone ECU with custom Z31-specific base map (rev limit set to 8,500 RPM). Ignition: HKS Twin Power spark plugs (BKR7EIX) with MSD 6AL ignition amplifier and Moroso 8mm silicone plug wires.

Drivetrain: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (2-way, 40% preload) with Z31-specific 3.90:1 final drive ratio (Nismo R200 differential). Clutch: Nismo twin-plate ceramic clutch (240mm) with lightweight aluminum flywheel. Transmission: Z31 5-speed manual (FS5W71C) with Nismo short shifter and Synchrotech carbon synchros for 1-2-3 gears.
estetica: Body Kit: Rocket Bunny Z31-specific widebody kit (Pandem) with custom 2-inch fender flares (hand-rolled steel) and carbon fiber front splitter (Seibon). Rear diffuser: Veilside Fortune 03-style (Z31-specific) with integrated tow hook mount. Hood: Seibon carbon fiber Z31 hood (vented, 3-piece design) with custom NACA ducts for intercooler cooling.

Wheels: Work Meister S1 3P (16x9.5 +15 front, 16x10.5 +20 rear) with Toyo R888R tires (225/50/16 front, 255/50/16 rear). Suspension: Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (Z31-specific, 8-way adjustable damping) with Nismo front strut tower bar and Cusco rear subframe brace. Bushings: SuperPro poly bushings (full kit, Z31-specific) for subframe, control arms, and sway bars.

Interior: Bride Zeta III bucket seats (Z31-specific mounts) with Takata 4-point harnesses. Steering wheel: Nardi Classic 350mm (deep dish, suede) with NRG quick-release hub. Gauges: Defi Advance BF series (oil pressure, boost, wideband AFR) mounted on custom A-pillar pod (carbon fiber, Z31-specific). Roll Cage: Custom 8-point chromoly cage (SCCA-legal) with bolt-in door bars (Z31-specific, no welding required).
